headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Consider Right Now and 1 We Turn Down
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: McKesson Announces Planned CFO Transition
summary: IRVING, Texas, March 05, 2026--McKesson Corporation (NYSE: MCK) today announced Britt Vitalone, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer (CFO), has elected to retire after a successful and distinguished 20-year career with the company, including more than eight years as CFO. Looking ahead, Kenny Cheung will join McKesson as Executive Vice President and CFO, effective May 29, 2026.
